schema.name: glob
schema.description: Finds files matching a glob pattern under the NDX virtual root. Supports **, *, ?, character classes, and brace alternatives such as **/*.{ts,tsx}. Prefer project-relative paths like apps/... for project directories; independent glob/read_file calls can be batched in one model response.

pattern.description: Glob pattern such as src/**/*.ts or apps/*/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}.

path.description: Directory to search in. Defaults to the project root. Prefer project-relative paths; absolute paths must stay under the NDX virtual root. Common virtual forms such as /workspace/<project>, workspace/<project>, and ndx/workspace/<project> are normalized.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. Defaults to 100.
